body_txt: What happens when Practically Different Generations is taken to an extreme, and a character winds up being older than the sibling of their parent. This is most often done with either the aunt/uncle in question being either adopted, a surrogate baby, or the paternal half-sibling of a character's parent, with their grandfather being an Absurdly Elderly Father and having offspring with a second wife ( though that would technically make them their half aunt/uncle ). Though examples with full siblings aren't impossible or even unheard of. The reason for choosing this sort of pairing in fiction varies, but is often a Comedy Trope . It could illustrate how the parents can't keep a condom on and continue to reproduce even when their child is old enough to become a parent themselves (this variant is often paired with Massively Numbered Siblings and/or Dysfunctional Family ). They're often depicted as either Like Brother and Sister more so than the actual siblings note the aunt/uncle and the parent of the niece/nephew who may even go to school together, or, if the age difference between the two is significant, a parent/child-type relationship with the roles being reversed in general. If the two are close in age, expect a variant of Sibling Seniority Squabble , with either the aunt/uncle or niece/nephew trying to exert authority over the other. Or it could be a reason as simple as a change in the typical family relationship dynamics seen on TV, as most younger relatives are often siblings or cousins if the characters are young. Hilarity Ensues when the aunt/uncle and niece/nephew have trouble explaining their relationship to other people, often resulting in the two picking a simpler title to go by such as "cousins". To qualify for this trope, the niece or nephew must be older than their aunt or uncle, or at least extremely close in age (though being an aunt/uncle when younger than 18 is not particularly commonplace either). Almost always overlaps with Practically Different Generations and sometimes Tangled Family Tree , Absurdly Elderly Mother , Absurdly Youthful Mother , Teen Pregnancy , Absurdly Youthful Father , and Grandparental Age Dissonance . Compare Sibling Seniority Squabble , where twin siblings argue over who is older down to the minute or second. This trope is usually a reason why Mistaken for Different Relative might occur between two people.
